    Index

    A B C D E G H I L M N O P Q R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class application.Main
    The main method which serves as the static entry point of the program.
    Main - Class in application
    The Main class serves as the entry point for the JavaFX application.
    Main() - Constructor for class application.Main
     
    mediaPlayer - Static variable in class utils.Goto
    The media player instance used for playing background music and sound effects.
    Medium - Class in item.level
    The Medium class represents an intermediate difficulty level for a puzzle.
    Medium(String, List<String>, List<String>) - Constructor for class item.level.Medium
    Constructs a Medium puzzle instance with a specific answer, picture list, and hint list.
    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class mode.GameMode
     
    mode - package mode
     
    ModeSelectionPane - Class in pane
    ModeSelectionPane is a UI component that provides the interface for players to select their desired game mode (EASY, MEDIUM, HARD, or BATTLE).
    ModeSelectionPane(GameModeSelector) - Constructor for class pane.ModeSelectionPane
    Constructs the ModeSelectionPane layout, including mode buttons and a back button.
    music(String) - Static method in class utils.Goto
    Stops current playback and starts playing background music from the specified path in an infinite loop.
